description: Top-level operator surface for the bundled validation-first JSON contract workflow.

entry_modes.description: Use when the source is prose or mixed artifacts and semantic extraction is required.
Use when the source is already JSON and can enter directly into contract validation.

operators.purpose: Normalize unstructured external input into a candidate JSON envelope.
preconditions: Input is not already canonical JSON.
notes: It does not accept or publish canonical artifacts by itself.

operators.purpose: Validate accepted JSON against canonical contracts and emit durable validation artifacts.
notes: Validate is the canonical artifact gate.
The bundled validator can emit both schema_validation_report and accepted_json artifacts.

non_goals: claim bundled unify execution when only validation is implemented
force validated inputs through derive or policy steps that are not shipped here
replace canonical JSON Schema contracts with runtime bindings
